title: Widen skeleton: full-ledger validation
description: Extend the single task schema from task-skeleton-task-next into zod schemas for every record type, and add `waystation validate` for cross-record checks per spec §18. This is the guardrail that makes it safe for humans and agents to touch files directly.
acceptance: zod schemas exist for config, task, issue, prompt, scope, claim, handoff, decision, and test-run records.

`waystation validate` detects: duplicate IDs, invalid statuses, missing required fields, missing task-dependency targets, circular dependencies, missing prompt/scope references, and invalid JSONL event lines.
Running validate against the current .waystation/ ledger passes (or reports only known, intended gaps).
bun:test covers at least duplicate-id, missing-reference, and circular-dependency detection.
notes: zod is the schema authority (decision-record-format): every read validates through it. This slice generalizes the loader that task-skeleton-task-next stood up for tasks only.
